subject: fix: restore scripts/lib/manifest.js deleted in previous session
body:
The manifest utility module was incorrectly deleted as "dead code" but is
imported by 5 scripts: pending.js, merge-analysis.js, save-commit.js,
save-batch.js, and manifest-update.js. Recovered from git history.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Cu1AmbztLY9WJDU7g94fEa
title: restore scripts/lib/manifest.js deleted in previous session
